data.title: Skill tool invocation loop: /dso:sprint repeatedly re-invokes itself without executing
data.description: When invoking /dso:sprint via the Skill tool, the skill never executes its actual logic. Instead, it enters an infinite loop where each invocation produces another 'Invoke the /dso:sprint skill' prompt, causing the Skill tool to be called again recursively. Observed 6+ consecutive invocations before manual interruption. This affects the ability to run any sprint workflow. Likely cause: the skill's SKILL.md or plugin dispatch mechanism is emitting a re-invocation instruction instead of the actual skill content.
